subtitle: Senior Director of IT -- Enterprise IT Portfolio | Cloud Architecture | Multi-Stakeholder Delivery
summary_text: Technology executive with 14 years leading enterprise IT organizations through infrastructure modernization, cloud migration, and digital transformation at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB). Appointed as the first CTO in MMI's 45-year history; built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team while governing $15M+ annual IT operating budget within $30-50M total IT spend. Deep record across the full IT leadership mandate: cloud and infrastructure strategy, enterprise systems governance (ERP/CRM), data and AI enablement (including production ML via DataRobot), SDLC modernization, and ePMO governance. Delivered multi-year cloud migration and contact center transformation with zero service disruption. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a structured evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions for enterprise environments.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Appointed as the first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history; built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team across IT operations, software engineering, infrastructure, data, and global vendor partners; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.

Spearheaded multi-year transition to a digital-first, cloud-first, security-first model; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance.

Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated cross-functional project governance across IT and non-IT functions and delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio.

Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders and a 45-50 person delivery organization; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions.

Led full contact center / communications platform transformation -- multi-channel integration, AI-assisted routing and coaching, integrated knowledge bots -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live.

Owned vendor governance across the full vendor lifecycle: SoW authorship, vendor budget and burn-rate tracking, multi-year vendor relationships, and resource leveling across in-house, nearshore, and offshore teams.
Modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% YoY.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: Enterprise IT Strategy, ePMO Governance, IT Financial Management, Vendor Governance, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, Cloud Migration, Multi-Generation End-User Compute, Network/Endpoint Security
Custom ERP/CRM Platforms, Sitecore, ServiceNow, JIRA, Microsoft 365
DataRobot (Production ML), Power BI, Tableau, SQL/T-SQL, Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, Build-Buy-Partner, Multi-Factor Prioritization
